system.description:
Story-based subclass.

Muscle Magic. Your muscles have "unlocked the secrets of the arcane" (and any fool who disputes that is about to have a bad day). You lose access to the Savage Arsenal and all weapon proficiencies but gain access to "Muscle Spells" which require you to have a certain number of Fury Dice to cast.

LEVEL 3

STRENGTH of Mind. Add your STR to INT-based skill checks.

LEVEL 7

I'm Fine! Totally Fine! (1/Safe Rest) When you drop to 0 hp, give a number of actions out to your allies equal to the number of Fury Dice you had.

LEVEL 11

Flexpertise. Reduce the Fury Die Requirement of your Muscle Spells by 2.

LEVEL 15

High Flexemplar. Gain +4 max wounds. "I'm Fine! Totally Fine!" is unlimited.

"Muscle Spells"

Power Word: Clobber (1 Action). 1d10+STR+Fury Dice (FD) damage. On Hit: a Medium or smaller creature is Clobbered.

Clobbered: Any Medium or smaller creature that is Dazed, Grappled, Prone, or has been forcefully moved this round is also considered Clobbered this round.

Throwmaturgy (2 Actions). Reach: 3/Fury Die. Throw a Clobbered creature at an enemy; both suffer 1d6+STR+FD damage and land Prone (if Medium or smaller). OR: for 1 action throw a rock or similarly throwable object instead.

Polymorph: CHICKEN! (1 Action). Requires: 3 FD. Reach: 3/Fury Dice. Yell "Chicken!" at a creature, Frightening them until the end of their next turn (Large+ creatures: Taunted instead).

Thunderfist (2 Actions). Requires: 3 FD. (Cone Num of FD) 1d20+STR+FD.

"Teleport" (1 Action). Requires: 4 FD. Leap up to a number of spaces equal the sum of your Fury Dice.

Meat Ward (1 Action). Requires: 5 FD. Reaction: When attacked make an adjacent creature Interpose for you.

Powershout: WEAKLINGS! (2 Actions). Requires: 6 FD. Reach: 6. FD damage to enemies, Frightening them (Large+ creatures are Taunted instead) and their Armor decreased by 1 step this round.

Earthquake (2 Actions). Requires: 7 FD. Reach: (1/encounter) Leap into the air land with seismic force. Creatures within Reach 4 take 3d20+FD damage and become Slowed. Clobbered creatures are knocked Prone as well.
